name: orchestrator-feedback
description: Provide real-time feedback about Orchestrator workflow compliance

action.message:
💡 **Workflow Tip**: This complex task involved multiple specialist agents. For optimal coordination and to ensure all aspects are properly addressed, consider using the Orchestrator agent next time:

**Recommended workflow:**
1. `@orchestrator [describe your task]`
2. Orchestrator will decompose and coordinate with appropriate specialists
3. Ensures completeness, proper sequencing, and comprehensive coverage

**Benefits of using Orchestrator:**
✅ Proper task decomposition
✅ Parallel agent coordination
✅ Progress tracking
✅ Comprehensive result consolidation
action.suggestion: Try using '@orchestrator' for complex multi-agent tasks
